name: Grupo Aeroportuario del Centro Norte, S.A.B. de C.V.
description: Grupo Aeroportuario del Centro Norte, S.A.B. de C.V., commonly known as OMA, is a prominent Mexican airport operator headquartered in San Pedro, near Monterrey. The company manages and operates 13 international airports across the central and northern regions of Mexico, including the major hub in Monterrey. OMA provides essential aeronautical and commercial services to millions of domestic and international passengers, ensuring compliance with international safety, security, and quality standards while facilitating regional economic development through its extensive airport network and strategic infrastructure investments.
